reviewer: scrutiny-validator (self-review, subagent failed due to permissions)

codeQuality.notes: Well-structured SessionMetadataPanel component using shadcn Card and ScrollArea. Proper responsive behavior (hidden on mobile, toggleable on desktop). Live duration timer with proper cleanup. Name source badge with appropriate variants. Layout correctly uses flex with aside element.

testCoverage.notes: 12 component tests covering all display states (summary present/empty, name sources, duration idle/active, theme shown/hidden). 4 reducer tests for sessionNameSource tracking.
